utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Are you seeing anybody right now ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Og ... ee ... op , I am not asking for me , I am ... I mean ... No , I am ... I am not gay , I am not asking you out .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am not ... I am not ... I am not gay !
